text: 95 agent iterations — the `--continue` flag is making each turn accumulate the full history. Let me wait for it to finish:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "RUN_DIR=$(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -1) && sleep 120 && PREV=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && sleep 30 && CURR=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && echo \"Was $PREV, now $CURR — $([ $PREV -eq $CURR ] && echo 'STABLE' || echo 'still running')\"", "description": "Final wait", "timeout": 200000}
